Paragraph.SourceString: Tick this box to enable or disable profanity filtering. Profanity filtering applies to in-game chat and players' signs, and can optionally apply to usernames and server names.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Tick this box to enable or disable profanity filtering. Profanity filtering applies to in-game chat and players' signs, and can optionally apply to usernames and server names.

Paragraph.SourceString: Tick this box to apply profanity filter to Server names.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Tick this box to apply profanity filter to Server names.

Paragraph.SourceString: Tick this box to apply profanity filter to usernames. Note that usernames will not be filtered in the server users list so you can copy usernames for reporting purposes.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Tick this box to apply profanity filter to usernames. Note that usernames will not be filtered in the server users list so you can copy usernames for reporting purposes.

Paragraph.SourceString: Select a font size (small, medium, or large).
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Select a font size (small, medium, or large).

Paragraph.SourceString:
Select how entries of that strength are used by the profanity filter system.

- "Always" will always filter entries, even if they are in the middle of another word. For instance, if "cat" is a profanity, then "scatter" would be filtered to "s***ter" and "caterpilar" to "***erpillar".

- "Filter if full word" will only filter entries that are surrounded by blank spaces or punctuation. For instance, if "cow" is a profanity, then "coward" will be unaltered, but "cow" will be filtered to "***".

- "Ignore" will simply ignore this specific list.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Select how entries of that strength are used by the profanity filter system.

- "Always" will always filter entries, even if they are in the middle of another word. For instance, if "cat" is a profanity, then "scatter" would be filtered to "s***ter" and "caterpilar" to "***erpillar".

- "Filter if full word" will only filter entries that are surrounded by blank spaces or punctuation. For instance, if "cow" is a profanity, then "coward" will be unaltered, but "cow" will be filtered to "***".

- "Ignore" will simply ignore this specific list.

AltTooltipText_UnavailableLanguageSelect.SourceString: Language can only be changed in the main menu.
AltTooltipText_UnavailableLanguageSelect.LocalizedString: Language can only be changed in the main menu.

LanguageRestartText.SourceString: To apply your language selection, you will be returned to the start menu.
LanguageRestartText.LocalizedString: To apply your language selection, you will be returned to the start menu.
